case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JORGE LUIS AGUILAR LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-15-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JORGE LUIS AGUILAR LOPEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JORGE LUIS AGUILAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO JAN-15-2020 AT 8:30 A.M. IN D.506. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDCIE BY PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JORGE LUIS AGUILAR LOPEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
